Disclaimer

Pocket OD is provided for educational and clinical reference purposes only. It is not a substitute for professional training or independent clinical judgment. Pocket OD does not engage in the practice of prescribing. All lens parameters, medication information, and clinical data should be verified independently before use. Each patient situation is unique — all treatment decisions should be individualized accordingly. Pocket OD cannot warrant the accuracy or completeness of information provided.
